name: formamide-rotation_transition_state
prompt: Run the transition-state task on the formamide-rotation TS guess geometry using the PM7 (mopac) method in the gas phase. Report the total energy in eV as the headline value, and state whether the converged structure is a valid TS (exactly one imaginary mode) and the imaginary frequency. State the method used. Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number. Use charge 0 and multiplicity 1.
